problem_statement: Design a bounded, reproducible evaluation for industrial defect detection.
scope: Offline, small-scale evaluation of industrial defect detection; no production deployment.
research_questions: Which evidence supports the evaluation design for industrial defect detection?
Which controlled comparison isolates the main failure mode?

evidence_gaps.description: Verifiable evidence for industrial defect detection.
A controlled evaluation using defect recall.

search_queries.query: industrial defect detection controlled comparison defect recall

success_criteria: All claims bind to accepted evidence
The primary metric is defect recall
risks: Small samples may produce unstable estimates
